news.t: Get Comprehensive Value With This Cash Flow ETF Combo
Structural Shift or Recency Bias? Decoding Value's Mixed Signals in 2026
This value-stock strategy has trounced the S&P 500 for nearly five years
Putnam Investments Launches Fixed Income and Non-U.S. Equity Exchange-Traded Funds

holdings.infoBox: PVAL is an equity ETF with a total of 47 individual holdings. The top holdings are Cisco Systems stock at 5.99%, Citigroup at 4.63%, Exxon Mobil at 3.62%, Alphabet at 3.29%, and Advanced Micro Devices at 3.06%.

overview.description: The Putnam Focused Large Cap Value ETF (PVAL) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is an actively-managed, non-transparent ETF that provides exposure to large-cap value companies in the US. The fund utilizes the Fidelity non-transparent model. PVAL was launched on May 25, 2021 and is issued by Putnam.

data.title: This value-stock strategy has trounced the S&P 500 for nearly five years
data.text: An investor may expect a value-oriented stock strategy to be less risky and less lucrative over the long term than the S&P 500 or a growth index.
